_comment: Question-page content config keyed by satellite inventory dir. Inventory owns domains/repo paths/groups; this file owns copy-generation knobs. generationMode=manual means the repo already owns hand-tuned question content and the generator must skip it while validators still count it as covered.

windshield-denver.note: Pilot question-page repo; already has hand-tuned src/data/questions.ts and should not be regenerated by the batch script.
